# Support

## Getting Help

- **Bug reports**: [Open an issue](https://github.com/readingbat/readingbat-core/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
- **Feature requests**: [Open an issue](https://github.com/readingbat/readingbat-core/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)
- **Questions**: [Start a discussion](https://github.com/readingbat/readingbat-core/discussions) or open an issue

## Before Opening an Issue

1. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/readingbat/readingbat-core/issues) to avoid duplicates
2. Include steps to reproduce for bugs
3. Include your environment details (OS, Java version, browser)
